narrative:
Union Twp township has 581 registered voters, with 42.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 50.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 43.5 percentage points.
